questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of the Chalk and Talk method, including the roles of the lecturer and the students, in the context of teaching-learning process.
questions.hint: Outline the key features of the Chalk and Talk method

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using PowerPoint Presentation in a teaching context? Provide examples to support your answer.
questions.hint: Consider both technical and pedagogical aspects

questions.question: How can a lecturer effectively combine the Chalk and Talk method with PowerPoint Presentation to engage students and promote learning outcomes?
